prompt:
Upload one reference photo of your face. Using the uploaded image, accurately reconstruct your face and place yourself in this exact subway station scene as an upper body portrait only. You are standing on the platform, body slightly angled left, head tilted upward and to the right at 20 to 25 degrees, looking up past the camera with a deeply introspective, melancholic expression, not looking at the lens.

Thick black rectangular frame glasses. Dark black high collar structured overcoat buttoned up. Directly behind you, a subway train is rushing past at full speed.

Extreme horizontal motion blur fills the entire background, silver grey train body blur with vivid electric blue stripe streak and warm orange light streak within the blur. Cool teal blue green fluorescent overhead lighting falls naturally on your face and hair from above. Subtle blue train light catches the edge of your right shoulder. Cool cinematic color grade with teal shadows and cool skin tones. Fine film grain.

Do NOT paste your face. The cool fluorescent teal light must fall naturally on your face from above with realistic shadows, a subtle blue rim light on your right shoulder, and a consistent cool color cast across your face that perfectly matches the underground subway environment. 1:1.
promptEn:
Upload one reference photo of your face. Using the uploaded image, accurately reconstruct your face and place yourself in this exact subway station scene as an upper body portrait only. You are standing on the platform, body slightly angled left, head tilted upward and to the right at 20 to 25 degrees, looking up past the camera with a deeply introspective, melancholic expression, not looking at the lens.

Thick black rectangular frame glasses. Dark black high collar structured overcoat buttoned up. Directly behind you, a subway train is rushing past at full speed.

Extreme horizontal motion blur fills the entire background, silver grey train body blur with vivid electric blue stripe streak and warm orange light streak within the blur. Cool teal blue green fluorescent overhead lighting falls naturally on your face and hair from above. Subtle blue train light catches the edge of your right shoulder. Cool cinematic color grade with teal shadows and cool skin tones. Fine film grain.

Do NOT paste your face. The cool fluorescent teal light must fall naturally on your face from above with realistic shadows, a subtle blue rim light on your right shoulder, and a consistent cool color cast across your face that perfectly matches the underground subway environment. 1:1.
promptZh:
上传一张你的面部参考照片。利用上传的图像，精准重构你的面部，并将你置于这个特定的 地铁站 场景中，仅限上半身肖像。你正站在站台上，身体微微向左倾斜，头部向上并向右倾斜 20 到 25 度，目光越过镜头向上看，表情深沉忧郁，不要直视镜头。

加粗黑色长方形框架眼镜。身穿 深黑色高领结构感大衣，扣子扣好。你的正后方，一列地铁正全速疾驰而过。

极端的水平动态模糊充斥着整个背景，银灰色车身模糊，伴随着鲜艳的电光蓝条纹和模糊中温暖的橙色光带。冷青蓝色的顶置荧光灯从上方自然地投射在你的脸部和头发上。微妙的蓝色列车光线映照在你右肩边缘。冷色调电影级调色，青色阴影，冷肤色。细腻的胶片颗粒感。

请勿直接粘贴人脸。冷色调的青色荧光必须从上方自然地落在你的脸上，形成逼真的阴影，右肩带有微妙的蓝色轮廓光，且面部呈现出与地下地铁环境完美匹配的冷色调。比例 1:1。
